menu_options.1: Import Assets (Vocal, Inst, Mixed, Lyrics, Background) - Copy to inputs/
menu_options.2: Create Karaoke Video (Instrumental) - Render from inputs/ to outputs/
menu_options.3: Create Lyrics Video (Mixed) - Render from inputs/ to outputs/
menu_options.4: Push Scripts to GitHub - Git add/commit/push

technical_requirements: Use osascript for file picking with type filtering (mp3/wav, ass/srt, jpg/png/mp4/mov)
Dashboard should display current file list using 'ls -1' on inputs/ directory
CORE INTEGRITY CONSTRAINT: Do not remove, prune, or simplify existing library calls, helper functions, or logic blocks unless explicitly requested by the user.
